form.formComment: Good run when beaten by 5.5 m finishing fourth after a quick start, behind Helluva at this track over 1609m in a No NR on March 14 at $2.60. Then a handy effort when a close second after being driven well back, behind Nyack at this track over 1609m in a No NR on March 27 at $12. Aided by the inside draw so is expected to feature.
